name: Master Peace, the True Dracoslaying King
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>真</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>マスター<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｐ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ピース</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Master Peace, the True Dragonsword King
desc: To Tribute Summon this card face-up, you can Tribute Continuous Spells/Traps you control, as well as monsters. Unaffected by the effects of cards with the same card type (Monster, Spell, and/or Trap) as the original card type of the cards Tributed for its Tribute Summon. Once per turn, if you control this Tribute Summoned monster (Quick Effect): You can banish 1 Continuous Spell/Trap from your GY, then target 1 other card on the field; destroy it.
mnst_eff: To Tribute Summon this card face-up, you can Tribute Continuous Spells/Traps you control, as well as monsters. Unaffected by the effects of cards with the same card type (Monster, Spell, and/or Trap) as the original card type of the cards Tributed for its Tribute Summon. Once per turn, if you control this Tribute Summoned monster (Quick Effect): You can banish 1 Continuous Spell/Trap from your GY, then target 1 other card on the field; destroy it.
eff: To Tribute Summon this card face-up, you can Tribute Continuous Spells/Traps you control, as well as monsters. summoning: Uses Spell/Trap Cards as Tributes for Normal Summon
